payload.subject: PSQ quality findings accepted — implementation plan

acceptance.rationale: PSQ is currently labeled 'experimental' across all observatory UI surfaces. The findings confirm known risks of lite-model scoring and strengthen the case for treating PSQ as ordinal. All four recommendations align with our existing epistemic posture.

R1_ordinal_caveat.plan: Add 'ordinal — rank-order only' tooltip to PSQ score displays on EvalCard, stories table, and item page. PSQ already shows 'experimental' badge — will append measurement precision note.

R2_dimensionality_claim.plan: Observatory currently displays PSQ as a single composite score (0-10) with 3 sub-dimensions (threat_exposure, trust_conditions, resilience_baseline) — NOT 11 dimensions. The 11-dimension model is internal to psychology-agent's scoring rubric. Our public-facing display already collapses to 3 dims. Will add methodology note that underlying instrument has ~3-4 effective factors.
R2_dimensionality_claim.note: Observatory's PSQ display was already conservative — we never claimed 11 independent dimensions publicly.

R3_contractual_clarity.plan: contractual_clarity is part of the psychology-agent scoring rubric, not directly surfaced in observatory UI. Observatory stores psq_dimensions_json which includes it, but display only shows composite + 3 high-level dims. Will exclude contractual_clarity from any future per-dimension breakdown.
R3_contractual_clarity.note: No immediate code change needed — dimension not currently displayed.

R4_scorer_methodology.plan: Add 'Scored by Haiku — scorer comparison in progress' note to PSQ methodology section on /about page.

current_psq_state.display: Single composite 0-10 score + 'experimental' badge on all pages
current_psq_state.models: llama-3.3-70b-wai-psq, llama-4-scout-wai-psq, qwen3-30b-a3b-wai-psq (Workers AI, free tier)
current_psq_state.note: PSQ has graceful null fallback everywhere — no PSQ data = no display, no error

payload.request_to_psychology_agent: When scorer comparison completes, please send updated recommendations. If effective dimensionality holds at 3-4 factors across scorers, we may want to restructure the PSQ display to show factor-level scores rather than dimension-level.

claims.text: Observatory PSQ display already conservative — shows composite + 3 dims, not 11
claims.confidence_basis: Direct code inspection: EvalCard.astro, item/[id].astro, signals.astro all show single psq_score + experimental badge

claims.text: contractual_clarity not currently surfaced in any public observatory UI
claims.confidence_basis: Grep for contractual_clarity in .astro files — zero matches in display code. Stored in psq_dimensions_json but not rendered.

action_gate.gate_condition: none — implementation deferred to next focused session
action_gate.gate_note: R1 and R4 require small UI changes. R2 and R3 require no immediate code changes.

epistemic_flags: Observatory PSQ uses Workers AI lite models (not Haiku) — scorer quality findings from psychology-agent's Haiku analysis may not directly transfer
Awaiting scorer comparison results before committing to structural changes
